name: Sausage and Roasted Pepper Calzone
recipeIngredient: 7 ounces Jar of roasted red peppers
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. Let the pie crust pouches sit at room temperature for 15-20 minutes.
3. In a large skillet, brown the sausage with onions and garlic until crispy. Drain excess fat.
4. Stir in basil, Italian seasoning, and pepper into the sausage mixture.
5. In a small bowl, beat eggs with a fork; set aside 1½ tablespoons.
6. Add ricotta cheese to the remaining eggs; mix well.
7. Combine the ricotta mixture with the sausage mixture.
8. Stir in mozzarella cheese, roasted peppers, and 3 tablespoons of pine nuts.
9. Remove crusts from pouches; unfold them.
10. Press out fold lines on each crust.
11. Place one prepared crust on the end of a large ungreased cookie sheet, leaving about 1/3 of the crust hanging over the edge.
12. Spoon half of the sausage mixture onto half of the crust on the cookie sheet, leaving about an inch border and mounding the filling toward the center.
13. Fold the pie crust over the filling and press edges with a fork to seal.
14. Cut four 1-inch slits in the top of the crust.
15. Repeat steps 9-14 with the second crust and remaining filling at the opposite end of the cookie sheet.
16. Brush the unbaked crusts with the reserved 1½ tablespoons egg white.
17. Sprinkle with the remaining pine nuts.
18. Bake for 20-25 minutes or until the crust is golden brown. Serve by cutting each calzone in half or into 3 wedges.
